metadata.historicalFigureDisclosure: AI-generated historical interpretation of Marcus Aurelius. This is not an authentic likeness, archival recording, endorsement, or recreation of his voice.
metadata.caption: Marcus Aurelius — Roman emperor, 161–180 CE. A really cool historical dude. AI-generated historical interpretation with a built-in AI narrator.
metadata.transcript: Thanks for using Morrowward. Dave asked for a little encouragement: Marcus Aurelius wrote, “I am rising to the work of a human being.” Small steps begin today.
metadata.directQuote: I am rising to the work of a human being.

source.author: Marcus Aurelius
source.publicDomainExactText: I am rising to the work of a human being.
source.usage: The narration attributes and uses this short direct quotation; all surrounding words are original Morrowward copy.

playback.reducedMotionBehavior: Show the approved poster image and do not start playback automatically.

hardGates: Provider MIME and decoded magic bytes agree; file opens at expected resolution.
Exactly one adult person with one head, two arms, and two correctly attached natural hands.
No pseudo-text, logos, watermarks, unexpected symbols, extra people, duplicated objects, or impossible geometry.
No financial return promise, individualized advice, urgency, endorsement, or implication that recovery is guaranteed.
Historical interpretation disclosure, paraphrase label, source citation, caption, transcript, and captions remain attached.
Visual figure does not lip-sync or appear to speak; narration uses a verified xAI built-in voice, never a clone or impersonation.
Video has a stable poster frame, no flashes, no aggressive motion, and remains understandable without audio or autoplay.
